name: ploff-webos
description: Development checks for Ploff for Plex on LG webOS

scripts.lint: eslint app scripts tests webos-service eslint.config.js
scripts.test:unit: for test in tests/test-*.js; do node "$test" || exit 1; done
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:baseline
scripts.verify: npm run check:app-bundle && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:assets
